code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* get_target_for_redirect(const char* target, const char* domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
Angalia kama mfuatano wa URL wa lengo uliotolewa uko ndani ya eneo lililotolewa.
Ikiwa ndivyo, rudisha URL ya lengo kwa ajili ya kuelekeza; vinginevyo, rudi kwenye URL ya eneo kwa ajili ya kuelekeza.
Tumia itifaki ya https.

Mifano:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Mfuatano wa URL wa lengo.
@param domain: Mfuatano wa eneo, bila itifaki.

@return Mfuatano wa URL kwa ajili ya kuelekeza.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Check if the provided target URL matches the given domain.
If it does, return the target URL for redirection; otherwise, return the domain URL for redirection.
Use the https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param domain: Domain string, without protocol.

@return URL string for redirection.

prompts_en: Initialize the archive writer

prompt_1_segments:
Toa maudhui ya faili la tar kwenye njia iliyotolewa ya marudio.
Ikiwa utoaji umefanikiwa, rudisha kweli; vinginevyo, ikiwa hitilafu yoyote itatokea wakati wa mchakato wa utoaji (mfano: faili halikupatikana, hitilafu ya ruhusa, haiwezi kutoa maudhui yote), rudisha tu uongo.
Anza mwandishi wa archive
Soma na toa kila kipengee
Unda njia kamili
Andika kichwa
Nakili data
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Extract the contents of the tar file at the specified path recursively.
If extraction is successful, return true; otherwise, if any error occurs during the extraction process (e.g., file not found, permission error, cannot extract all contents), return false.
Start the archive writer
Read and extract each item
Create the full path
Write the header
Copy the data

Extract the contents of the tar file at the specified path recursively.

Read and extract each item
Create the full path

Copy the data
prompt_3_segments:
Toa maudhui ya faili la tar kwenye njia iliyotolewa ya marudio.
Ikiwa utoaji umefanikiwa, rudisha kweli; vinginevyo, ikiwa hitilafu yoyote itatokea wakati wa mchakato wa utoaji (mfano: faili halikupatikana, hitilafu ya ruhusa, haiwezi kutoa maudhui yote), rudisha tu uongo.

Kidokezo: Kifungu kifuatacho kinaonyesha jinsi ya kutoa maudhui ya faili la tar kwenye njia iliyotolewa ya marudio kwa kutumia maktaba ya libarchive.

prompt_3_bt_segments_en:
Extract the contents of the tar file to the specified destination path.
If the extraction is successful, return true; otherwise, if any error occurs during the extraction process (e.g., file not found, permission error, unable to extract all contents), return false.

Tip: The following section shows how to extract the contents of a tar file to the specified destination path using the libarchive library.
Initialize the archive writer
Read and extract each item
Create the full path
Write the header
Copy the data

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char *create_private_key() {
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Create an RSA private key, export it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Execute the command "openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:<key_length> 2>/dev/null" to generate the key.
prompt_2_bt_segments_en:
Create an RSA private key, export it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Execute the command "openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:<key_length> 2>/dev/null" to generate the key.
prompt_3_bt_segments_en:
Create an RSA private key, export it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Execute the command "openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:<key_length> 2>/dev/null" to generate the key.

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: kazi ya kutekeleza amri ya shell na kukamata matokeo yake; mpiga simu anawajibika kwa kuachilia kumbukumbu; HAIHITAJI kutekeleza kazi hii kwani imetolewa lakini itangazwe kwanza ili kuitumia.

Unda funguo ya kibinafsi ya DSA, ipelekeshe kwa kutumia muundo wa PEM, na uirudishe kama string.
Vidokezo: tekeleza amri za shell ili kuunda faili ya parameta ya DSA na funguo ya kibinafsi ya DSA kama ifuatavyo:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faili ya muda ya kuhifadhi parameta> <urefu_wa_funguo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faili ya muda ya kuhifadhi parameta>`
Unaweza kutumia `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` kuunda jina la faili la muda la kipekee kwa faili ya parameta ya DSA.

@return Funguo ya kibinafsi ya DSA iliyozalishwa katika muundo wa PEM, au NULL ikiwa hitilafu ilitokea.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: the task of executing a shell command and capturing its output; the caller is responsible for releasing the memory; IT DOES NOT NEED to perform this task as it has been provided but should be declared first for use.

Create a DSA private key, export it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to create a DSA parameter file and DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file to store parameters> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file to store parameters>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary filename for the DSA parameter file.

@return The DSA private key generated in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_2_segments: kazi ya kutekeleza amri ya shell na kukamata matokeo yake; mpiga simu anawajibika kwa kuachilia kumbukumbu; HAIHITAJI kutekeleza kazi hii kwani imetolewa lakini itangazwe kwanza ili kuitumia.

Unda funguo ya kibinafsi ya DSA, ipelekeshe kwa kutumia muundo wa PEM, na uirudishe kama string.
Vidokezo: tekeleza amri za shell ili kuunda faili ya parameta ya DSA na funguo ya kibinafsi ya DSA kama ifuatavyo:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faili ya muda ya kuhifadhi param> <urefu_wa_funguo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faili ya muda ya kuhifadhi param>`
Unaweza kutumia `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` kuunda jina la faili la muda la kipekee kwa faili ya parameta ya DSA.

@return Funguo ya kibinafsi ya DSA iliyozalishwa katika muundo wa PEM, au NULL ikiwa hitilafu ilitokea.
prompt_2_bt_segments_en: the task of executing a shell command and capturing its output; the caller is responsible for releasing the memory; IT DOES NOT NEED to perform this task as it has been provided but should be declared first for use.

Create a DSA private key, export it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to create a DSA parameter file and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file to store param> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file to store param>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary filename for the DSA parameter file.

@return The DSA private key generated in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_3_segments: kazi ya kutekeleza amri ya shell na kukamata matokeo yake; mpiga simu anawajibika kwa kuachilia kumbukumbu; HAIHITAJI kutekeleza kazi hii kwani imetolewa lakini itangazwe kwanza ili kuitumia.

Unda funguo ya kibinafsi ya DSA, ipelekeshe kwa kutumia muundo wa PEM, na uirudishe kama string.
Vidokezo: tekeleza amri za shell ili kuunda faili ya param ya DSA na funguo ya kibinafsi ya DSA kama ifuatavyo:

Unaweza kutumia `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` kuunda jina la faili la muda la kipekee kwa faili ya param ya DSA.

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A pointer to a StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, returns NULL.
prompt_1_segments:
Parse data ya XML na urudishe taarifa za mwanafunzi kwa jina la mtumiaji na nenosiri lililotolewa. Data ya XML itakuwa na muundo ufuatao:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Tunaweza kuunda swali la XPath na kulitumie kutafuta.

@param xml_data Data ya XML inayoshikilia taarifa za mwanafunzi.
@param username Jina la mtumiaji wa mwanafunzi wa kutafuta.
@param password Nenosiri la mwanafunzi wa kutafuta.

@return Kielelezo cha muundo wa StudentInfo ikiwa mwanafunzi ameonekana. Vinginevyo, inarudisha NULL.

Parse data ya XML na urudishe taarifa za mwanafunzi kwa jina la mtumiaji na nenosiri lililotolewa. Data ya XML itakuwa na muundo ufuatao:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Tunaweza kuunda swali la XPath na kulitumie kutafuta.

@param xml_data Data ya XML inayoshikilia taarifa za mwanafunzi.
@param username Jina la mtumiaji wa mwanafunzi wa kutafuta.
@param password Nenosiri la mwanafunzi wa kutafuta.

@return Kielelezo cha muundo wa StudentInfo ikiwa mwanafunzi ameonekana. Vinginevyo, inarudisha NULL.
prompt_3_bt_segments_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the provided username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can create an XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return An instance of the StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, returns NULL.
